subject: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Launch Retrospective today. Here's a summary of what
we decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option C for the Notification Hub migration
(projected savings: $162K/yr)
- Horizon launch date moved to Q4 (from original Q2 target)
- Marketing team will own the Security Hardening workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the Pinnacle Analytics contract timeline? (Grace to
investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for Senior Engineer? (Grace to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/f4d085b9479d

Regards,
David

DISCLAIMER: The information contained in this email is intended only for the person or entity to which it is addressed and may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Unauthorized review, use, disclosure or distribution is prohibited.

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Team,

Effective Monday, we're updating the Access Control policy. Key changes:

1. Marketing approval is now required for any Auth Service changes in
production (previously only staging required approval)
2. All PRs affecting Phoenix must include load test results
3. North America deployments will follow a new rolling strategy
4. Incident response SLA updated: P1 = 22min, P2 = 62min

Full policy doc: https://wiki.internal/policies/4cdee3887b

Please review by EOD Monday and flag any concerns to Irene.

Thanks,
Grace

Best,
Grace Brown
Director of Engineering, Marketing
Initech

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Hi Grace,

I've reviewed the budget and have some concerns about the Aurora approach.
Specifically:

1. The proposed timeline seems aggressive given the Finance team's current
bandwidth (they're already at 59% capacity with Auth Service work)
2. We haven't accounted for the User Directory deprecation in Q1
3. The $55K budget allocation for NetSecure Pro seems high compared to
Pinnacle Analytics who quoted $37K
4. Irene's team hasn't signed off on the Data Governance dependency

I'd suggest we revisit this in our next standup meeting.

Best,
Steve

Best,
Steve Moore
Architect, Support
Oscorp

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Team,

Effective Friday, we're updating the PTO Accrual policy. Key changes:

1. Product approval is now required for any Logging Service changes in
production (previously only staging required approval)
2. All PRs affecting Horizon must include integration tests
3. North America deployments will follow a new canary strategy
4. Incident response SLA updated: P1 = 28min, P2 = 67min

Full policy doc: https://wiki.internal/policies/4ebd9454ee

Please review by EOD Thursday and flag any concerns to Grace.

Thanks,
Fatima

Best,
Fatima Davis
Software Engineer, Legal
Cyberdyne

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Hi David,

Just a heads up — the Search Index deployment (v4.1.99) is scheduled for
Wednesday at 16:00 JST. Expected downtime is approximately 20 minutes.

Changes include:
- PR #6348: Fix error handling
- PR #6362: Zenith feature flag rollout
- Config update for North America region

Please make sure your team is aware and has saved any in-progress work.
We'll send a notification to #legal once complete.

Thanks,
David
